title: Rei Ramen
wikitext:
[]: Rei Ramen             Quote Post by drinian » Sun Feb 15, 2009 12:13 am Here we go again... did I miss the discussion on this (as much as one can discuss a cup of ramen)? http://www.amiami.com/shop/ProductInfo/product_id/115659 http://www.sankakucomplex.com/2009/02/14/rei-ayanami-ita-ramen-on-sale/

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Feb 15, 2009 1:02 am It was discussed in the IRC the other day for like a total of ~5min. That is all.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Feb 15, 2009 1:13 am All I can say is: .................... (Seriously, me thinks the Gainax Cash Cow goes too far... Although I'd be tempted to try that or an Asuka version (if they'd make that) if it weren't for my gluten intolerance. )

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Feb 15, 2009 2:26 am It's because Lawsons is a sponsor for Rebuild. They can do whatever they want. There was all kinds of random Evangelion related food items in Lawsons, including cookies and bread.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Feb 15, 2009 7:00 am Do I see a LoL fork, or are my eyes deceiving me??! If it is, I very much want.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 15, 2009 8:25 am Fazmotron wrote: Do I see a LoL fork, or are my eyes deceiving me??!

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Feb 15, 2009 1:19 pm I just love how the picture says "Rei orderded"

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sun Feb 15, 2009 2:48 pm Action_Bastard wrote: I just love how the picture says "Rei orderded"

[]:             Quote Post by SAWgunner » Sun Feb 15, 2009 10:18 pm Am I a sucker for really wanting to eat that?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Feb 15, 2009 10:50 pm I looks like Gainax has gone to far on milking on the series. But it not where as bad as most anime food items like this one for example:

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Sun Feb 15, 2009 11:20 pm drinian wrote: Action_Bastard wrote: I just love how the picture says "Rei orderded"

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Feb 16, 2009 1:30 am Reichu wrote: According to the second link, it's “Lance of Longinus” seals on the lid. Whatever that means.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 16, 2009 1:57 am Guyver Spawn wrote: But it not where as bad as most anime food items like this one for example:

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Mon Feb 16, 2009 12:14 pm Grand Duke of Yashima wrote: She orders "Garlic Roast Pork Ramen w/o pork." I'm willing to bet it's the same thing. I forget what Asuka and Misato ordered in that episode, but someone I'm sure they'll come up with the appropriate flavors.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 16, 2009 2:29 pm The second linked site says that it is indeed "garlic ramen", although I doubt the ramen Rei orderded [sic] included A.T. Field fishcake toppings... Here's hoping Rei isn't one of those phony vegetarians who wouldn't count fish as " niku ". Those "vegetarians" piss me off.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 16, 2009 3:10 pm Reichu wrote: Here's hoping Rei isn't one of those phony vegetarians

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Feb 16, 2009 4:53 pm Reichu wrote: Here's hoping Rei isn't one of those phony vegetarians who wouldn't count fish as " niku ". Those "vegetarians" piss me off.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Feb 17, 2009 12:41 am In early Japan, when buddhism moved in, fish was not considered kosher. Then in 737 emperor Shomu allowed aquatic life to be consumed and ever since then fish was eaten on special occasions and not considered "meat" (though most devout buddhists still didn't partake). Also, if Rei's vegetarianism is based on Anno's she likely wouldn't eat fish since he abstains from it. ALSO, there's pretty much universally animal stock, whether sea or terrestrial life, in ramen. Also, Gainax likes making money just like any company and they do the same thing that any company with their interests in mind would do so can we knock off the LOL GAINAX CASH COW bullshit, because that trope is really played out, kthx.

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Fri Feb 20, 2009 1:06 am I think Misato orders Curry Ramen in that scene. Does anyone know what Shinji and Asuka order?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 20, 2009 2:09 am Literal translation project episode 12 wrote: -------------- Paper lantern of a Chinese noodle stand. -------------- Asuka: I know what you've got in your wallet. Don't worry. Asuka: The honour student said she'd come with us for Chinese noodles. Rei: I'd like garlic noodles without ChaShu. (Chinese grilled pork) Asuka: Gimme a shark fin and a large order of baked pork. Proprietor: Here you go--the shark fin with baked pork. Shinji: Hey, Misato-san. Misato: What? Shinji: When I heard my father's words, I found that for the first time I was glad to be praised. Shinji: And I also found that... that I pilot Eva just to hear my father say those words. Asuka: That's why you're a pilot? Asuka: Truly idiotic!
summary:

Article: Rei Ramen
ato-san. Misato: What? Shinji: When I heard my father's words, I found that for the first time I was glad to be praised. Shinji: And I also found that... that I pilot Eva just to hear my father say those words. Asuka: That's why you're a pilot? Asuka: Truly idiotic!
